nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。

nodes.name: Rajah Sikatuna Protected Landscape
nodes.summary: Rajah Sikatuna Protected Landscape是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联30种鸟类，包括Black-faced coucal、Philippine drongo-cuckoo、Philippine hawk-cuckoo等30种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Pasonanca Natural Park
nodes.summary: Pasonanca Natural Park是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联36种鸟类，包括Philippine drongo-cuckoo、Philippine hawk-cuckoo、Chocolate boobook等36种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Bataan National Park
nodes.summary: Bataan National Park是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联23种鸟类，包括Rufous coucal、Scale-feathered malkoha、Philippine drongo-cuckoo等23种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Chocolate boobook
nodes.summary: Chocolate boobook（Chocolate boobook，学名 Ninox randi），在图谱中标记为近危（NT）物种，已关联3个分布地点节点，主要威胁包括森林砍伐。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in multiple protected areas such as Pasonanca Natural Park, Rajah Sikatuna Protected Landscape and Bataan National Park but like all areas in the Philippines, protection is lax and deforestation continues despite this protection on paper

links.evidence: It is found in multiple protected areas such as Pasonanca Natural Park, Rajah Sikatuna Protected Landscape and Bataan National Park but like all areas in the Philippines, protection is lax and deforestation continues despite this protection on paper

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: IUCN has assessed this bird as near-threatened species with the population believed to be declining due to deforestation in the Philippines continues throughout the country due to slash and burn farming, mining, illegal logging and habitat conversion
